LearningPath.title: LearningPath
LearningPath.description: Represents a high-level programming course or learning track within Code Ascent, similar to a Duolingo language course, covering broad topics like 'Web Development' or 'Python Programming'.

id.description: Unique identifier for the LearningPath entity.

name.description: The human-readable name of the learning path (e.g., 'Python Programming Fundamentals', 'Web Development Basics').

description.description: A detailed description of what the learning path covers, its objectives, and target audience.

iconUrl.description: URL to an image or icon representing the learning path in the UI.

difficultyLevel.description: The overall difficulty level of the learning path (e.g., 'Beginner', 'Intermediate', 'Advanced', 'Expert').

tags.description: An array of categorization tags for the learning path (e.g., 'Python', 'Backend', 'Frontend', 'Security').

Module.title: Module
Module.description: A cohesive, ordered unit of learning content within a LearningPath, typically focusing on a specific topic or skill area, and comprising multiple Lessons.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Module entity.

learningPathId.description: Reference to the LearningPath this module belongs to. (Relationship: LearningPath 1:N Module)

name.description: The title of the module (e.g., 'Python Basics: Variables and Data Types').

description.description: A summary of the specific topics and learning outcomes covered within this module.

order.description: The sequential order of the module within its parent learning path, determining its position in the learning progression.

Lesson.title: Lesson
Lesson.description: An individual educational step within a Module, which can be an explanation, an interactive coding exercise, a quiz, or other content types.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Lesson entity.

moduleId.description: Reference to the Module this lesson belongs to. (Relationship: Module 1:N Lesson)

name.description: The title of the lesson (e.g., 'Declaring String Variables', 'Introduction to Loops').

description.description: A brief description outlining the main objective or content of the lesson.

contentType.description: The type of content presented in this lesson (e.g., 'TextExplanation', 'CodingExercise', 'Quiz', 'VideoLink').

contentRef.description: A reference or identifier pointing to the actual lesson content (e.g., a file path for markdown, a key for a content management system, or a JSON string for simple exercises).

order.description: The sequential order of the lesson within its parent module.

SkillTreeNode.title: SkillTreeNode
SkillTreeNode.description: Represents a distinct programming skill or concept that can be mastered by a user, forming a node in the visual skill tree for progress tracking.

id.description: Unique identifier for the SkillTreeNode entity.

learningPathId.description: Reference to the LearningPath this skill node is associated with. (Relationship: LearningPath 1:N SkillTreeNode)

name.description: The name of the skill (e.g., 'Basic Python Syntax', 'Object-Oriented Principles', 'API Design').

description.description: A detailed explanation of what mastering this specific skill entails and its relevance.

prerequisiteSkillNodeIds.description: An array of SkillTreeNode IDs that represent prerequisite skills required to unlock or effectively learn this skill. (Relationship: SkillTreeNode N:N SkillTreeNode)

xpValue.description: The amount of experience points awarded to the user upon demonstrating mastery of this skill.

category.description: A broader category that this skill belongs to (e.g., 'Fundamentals', 'Control Flow', 'Data Structures', 'Web Frameworks').

UserLearningProfile.title: UserLearningProfile
UserLearningProfile.description: Stores personalized data, preferences, and AI-driven insights about a user's learning habits, strengths, and weaknesses for adaptive learning.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserLearningProfile entity.

userId.description: The unique identifier of the user from the external authentication system. (Relationship: User 1:1 UserLearningProfile)

strengths.description: An array of topics or skills where the user has demonstrated high proficiency or understanding, identified by AI analysis.

weaknesses.description: An array of topics or skills where the user has demonstrated difficulty or requires more practice, identified by AI analysis.

preferredLearningStyles.description: An array of the user's preferred learning methodologies (e.g., 'Visual', 'Interactive', 'Text-based', 'Problem-Solving').

aiAdaptivePreferences.description: A stringified JSON object storing user-specific preferences or AI configuration settings that influence dynamic learning path adaptation (e.g., desired pace, challenge tolerance, preferred feedback style).

UserLessonProgress.title: UserLessonProgress
UserLessonProgress.description: Tracks a specific user's progress, performance, and interaction history for an individual Lesson.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserLessonProgress entity.

userId.description: The unique identifier of the user from the external authentication system. (Relationship: User 1:N UserLessonProgress)

lessonId.description: Reference to the Lesson this progress record is for. (Relationship: Lesson 1:N UserLessonProgress)

status.description: The current completion status of the lesson for the user (e.g., 'NotStarted', 'InProgress', 'Completed', 'Skipped').

score.description: The score achieved on the lesson's exercise or quiz, typically ranging from 0 to 100.

attempts.description: The total number of attempts the user made to complete the lesson or its interactive components.

lastAttemptDate.description: The timestamp of the user's most recent interaction or attempt with this lesson.

completedDate.description: The timestamp when the user officially completed this lesson.

codeHistoryRef.description: A reference (e.g., file path, database ID) to the user's submitted code snippets for coding exercises within this lesson.

aiFeedbackHistoryRef.description: A reference (e.g., file path, database ID) to the history of AI-generated feedback provided for the user's submissions in this lesson.

UserSkillMastery.title: UserSkillMastery
UserSkillMastery.description: Records a specific user's current mastery level and related progress for an individual SkillTreeNode.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserSkillMastery entity.

userId.description: The unique identifier of the user from the external authentication system. (Relationship: User 1:N UserSkillMastery)

skillNodeId.description: Reference to the SkillTreeNode this mastery record is associated with. (Relationship: SkillTreeNode 1:N UserSkillMastery)

learningPathId.description: Reference to the LearningPath the skill node belongs to, for contextual filtering. (Relationship: LearningPath 1:N UserSkillMastery)

masteryLevel.description: A numerical value representing the user's current mastery level for the skill (e.g., 0-100, where 100 indicates full mastery).

achievedDate.description: The timestamp when the user reached the current mastery level or completed this skill.

lastReviewedDate.description: The timestamp of the last time the user actively reviewed or practiced content related to this skill.

UserLearningPathProgress.title: UserLearningPathProgress
UserLearningPathProgress.description: Tracks a specific user's overall progress, current position, and milestones within an entire LearningPath.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserLearningPathProgress entity.

userId.description: The unique identifier of the user from the external authentication system. (Relationship: User 1:N UserLearningPathProgress)

learningPathId.description: Reference to the LearningPath this progress record is for. (Relationship: LearningPath 1:N UserLearningPathProgress)

status.description: The overall status of the user's engagement with this learning path (e.g., 'NotStarted', 'InProgress', 'Completed', 'Paused').

currentModuleId.description: Reference to the Module the user is currently focused on within this learning path. (Relationship: Module 1:N UserLearningPathProgress)

currentLessonId.description: Reference to the Lesson the user is currently working on within their current module in this path. (Relationship: Lesson 1:N UserLearningPathProgress)

progressPercentage.description: The calculated overall completion percentage of the learning path for the user (0-100).

startDate.description: The timestamp when the user first started this learning path.

completionDate.description: The timestamp when the user officially completed this entire learning path.

definition.description: Publicly accessible information about a high-level programming course or learning track. All authenticated users can read this content. Admins have write access.

params.name: learningPathId
params.description: The unique identifier of the learning path.

definition.description: Contains modules for a specific learning path. Accessible by all authenticated users. Includes denormalized 'learningPathId' for direct access context. Admins have write access.

params.name: learningPathId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent learning path.

params.name: moduleId
params.description: The unique identifier of the module.

definition.description: Contains individual lessons for a specific module within a learning path. Accessible by all authenticated users. Includes denormalized 'moduleId' (and implicitly 'learningPathId') for direct access context. Admins have write access.

params.name: learningPathId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent learning path.

params.name: moduleId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent module.

params.name: lessonId
params.description: The unique identifier of the lesson.

definition.description: Defines individual skill nodes within a learning path's visual skill tree. Accessible by all authenticated users. Includes denormalized 'learningPathId' for direct access context. Admins have write access.

params.name: learningPathId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent learning path.

params.name: skillNodeId
params.description: The unique identifier of the skill tree node.

definition.description: Stores personalized data and AI-driven insights for a specific user. Access is restricted to the owner (`request.auth.uid == userId`). Includes denormalized 'userId' for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user (from `request.auth.uid`).

definition.description: Tracks a user's overall progress within a specific learning path. Access is restricted to the owner (`request.auth.uid == userId`). Includes denormalized 'userId' and 'learningPathId' for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user (from `request.auth.uid`).

params.name: learningPathId
params.description: The unique identifier of the learning path this progress record is for.

definition.description: Tracks a user's progress and performance on individual lessons. Access is restricted to the owner (`request.auth.uid == userId`). Includes denormalized 'userId' and 'lessonId' for authorization independence. This flatter structure simplifies querying all user lesson progress regardless of learning path/module.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user (from `request.auth.uid`).

params.name: lessonId
params.description: The unique identifier of the lesson this progress record is for.

definition.description: Records a user's mastery level for individual skill nodes. Access is restricted to the owner (`request.auth.uid == userId`). Includes denormalized 'userId', 'skillNodeId', and 'learningPathId' for authorization independence. This flatter structure simplifies querying all user skill mastery records.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user (from `request.auth.uid`).

params.name: skillNodeId
params.description: The unique identifier of the skill tree node this mastery record is for.

firestore.reasoning:
The proposed Firestore structure prioritizes secure, scalable, and debuggable access to learning content and user progress data. It achieves **Authorization Independence** by segregating global, publicly accessible learning content from private, user-specific progress data. For all user-specific data (UserLearningProfile, UserLearningPathProgress, UserLessonProgress, UserSkillMastery), the `userId` is explicitly embedded in the document's path (e.g., `/users/{userId}/profile`) and also denormalized within the document itself (e.g., `UserLearningProfile.userId`). This design allows Firestore security rules to directly compare `request.auth.uid` with the `{userId}` wildcard in the path, and optionally cross-reference the `userId` field within the document, without requiring costly and complex `get()` operations. This ensures atomic operations for creating user-related documents and simplifies rule writing significantly.

**QAPs (Queries are not Filters)** are inherently supported through this structural segregation. For global learning content (LearningPath, Module, Lesson, SkillTreeNode), all authenticated users have read access. Since these collections contain only public content, `list` operations on these paths will securely return all relevant documents without requiring additional filtering logic in rules. For user-specific data, `list` operations are implicitly secure because they are always scoped under `/users/{userId}/...`. A query to `/users/{uid}/lessonProgress` for example, will only ever return lessons owned by the `uid` making the request, fulfilling the QAP requirement. Denormalized fields like `learningPathId` within user progress documents facilitate efficient querying of a user's progress within a specific learning path without needing to traverse multiple parent documents. The `UserLearningProfile` entity directly addresses the 'AI for each user' requirement by providing a dedicated place to store AI-driven insights, strengths, weaknesses, and adaptive learning preferences, ensuring personalization is a core part of the user experience.
